race.comment: HOLD THE DOOR (9) bolted in over 1500m at Goulburn two back then went awfully at the Kensington track last start. Lightly raced gelding trained by Gai and Adrian so it would not be wise to write him off just yet. OWEN COUNTY (5) has not won for over two years but wasn't far away over 2100m at Hawkesbury last start. Each-way chance. ALICE MAE (2) handy stayer who has been plain of late including last start when well held over 2100m at Hawkesbury. Has claims here. VILLA CASTINA (14) three-year-old in pretty sound form but jumps 425m to a trip she is untried at. Could surprise. PRINCE IS GAME (17) finished sixth last start over 2200m at Scone when he had to contend with an awkward barrier. Can return to form
